title: God Creates a Beautiful World

activities: ["Creation timeline activity","Draw favorite creation","Creation prayer circle","ADW Saint Study: Sts. Joachim and Anne — learn about their life and witness to the faith"]
prayerFocus: Glory Be to the Father | ADW Required: Sign of the Cross; Blessing Before Meals
takeHome: Draw a picture of your favorite part of creation

title: God Creates People in His Image
objective: Understand we are made in God's image and likeness
scriptureRef: Genesis 1:26-27; Luke 23-24 (Death and Resurrection of Jesus)
activities: ["Image of God discussion","Paper doll chain","Uniqueness sharing circle","ADW Saint Study: St. Patrick — learn about their life and witness to the faith"]
prayerFocus: Thank you God for making me in your image
takeHome: Name 3 ways you are like God (loving, creative, kind)

title: God Gives Us the Gift of Life
objective: Recognize life as a precious gift from God

activities: ["Life timeline activity","Gift box decorating","Life is a gift song"]
prayerFocus: Prayer of thanksgiving for the gift of life
takeHome: Ask your parents to share your baby photos

activities: ["Garden of Eden dramatic play","Name the animals game","Paradise mural"]

title: The Angel Visits Mary
objective: Learn about the Annunciation and Mary's yes to God
activities: ["Annunciation role play","Angel Gabriel craft","Hail Mary practice"]
